Class AsyncExceptionMapper

java.lang.Object
com.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.internal.AsyncExceptionMapper
public final class AsyncExceptionMapper extends Object
Centralized utility for consistent async exception mapping across all async builders.

Usage: All async builder CompletableFuture chains MUST use .exceptionally(AsyncExceptionMapper.handler("Operation", tableName)) instead of inline .handle() or .exceptionally() with instanceof checks. The centralized handler correctly unwraps CompletionException, routes DynamoDbException → OperationFailedException, ConditionalCheckFailedException → ConditionFailedException, and wraps other throwables as DynamoSimplifiedException.

Ensures every async builder wraps exceptions with the same semantics:

  • ConditionalCheckFailedException → ConditionFailedException
  • DynamoDbException → OperationFailedException
  • All other RuntimeException → rethrown as-is
  • Checked exceptions → wrapped in DynamoSimplifiedException

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> @NonNull Function<Throwable, T>
    handler(@NonNull String operation, @Nullable String tableName)
    Creates a Function suitable for passing to CompletableFuture.exceptionally(Function).
    static @NonNull RuntimeException
    mapException(@NonNull String operation, @Nullable String tableName, @NonNull Throwable cause)
    Wraps a Throwable from a CompletableFuture.exceptionally(Function) handler into the appropriate DynamoSimplifiedException subtype.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • mapException

      public static @NonNull RuntimeException mapException(@NonNull String operation, @Nullable String tableName, @NonNull Throwable cause)
      Wraps a Throwable from a CompletableFuture.exceptionally(Function) handler into the appropriate DynamoSimplifiedException subtype.
      Parameters:
      operation - the DynamoDB operation name (e.g., "Query", "UpdateItem")
      tableName - the table name (nullable for cross-table operations)
      cause - the throwable from the exceptionally handler
      Returns:
      never returns: always throws

    • handler

      public static <T> @NonNull Function<Throwable, T> handler(@NonNull String operation, @Nullable String tableName)
      Creates a Function suitable for passing to CompletableFuture.exceptionally(Function).
      Type Parameters:
      T - the future result type
      Parameters:
      operation - the DynamoDB operation name
      tableName - the table name (nullable)
      Returns:
      a function that re-throws the wrapped exception
